title: Agent development and AgentOps with BigQuery, ADK, and MCP
summary: Google Cloud presented methods for building agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) integrated with Model Context Protocol (MCP) to standardize agent connections to data sources like BigQuery, AlloyDB, and Google Maps. The session covered AgentOps for monitoring agent performance and costs through observability.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building agents with the Agent Development Kit (ADK) paired with the Model Context Protocol (MCP), which standardizes how agents connect to data sources including BigQuery, AlloyDB, and Google Maps. The session also covers AgentOps, applying observability to monitor agent performance and costs. The takeaway is a workflow that combines a standardized connection layer for data access with operational tooling for tracking how agents behave in production.
